title: President Rinkēvičs: Back to manual vote counting in this year's elections
summary_full: In the upcoming 15th Saeima elections this fall, votes will have to be counted manually, President Edgars Rinkēvičs said in a statement on 23rd March.
summary_public: In the upcoming 15th Saeima elections this fall, votes will have to be counted manually, President Edgars Rinkēvičs said in a statement on 23rd March.
